languages.text: "Виг, да ты просто счастливчик! Ушел на смерть, а вернулся с подмогой! Старейшины тебя точно вознаградят".

traits.locale_text: "Виг, да ты просто счастливчик! Ушел на смерть, а вернулся с подмогой! Старейшины тебя точно вознаградят".
"Виг, да ты просто счастливчик! Ушел на смерть, а вернулся с подмогой! Старейшины тебя точно вознаградят".

languages.text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."
languages.original_text: "Виг, да ты просто счастливчик! Ушел на смерть, а вернулся с подмогой! Старейшины тебя точно вознаградят".

traits.locale_text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."
"Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."
"Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."

languages.text: "Vig, du bist ein Glückspilz! Du bist gegangen, um zu sterben, aber du bist zurückgekommen und hast stattdessen Hilfe gebracht! Die Ältesten werden dich sicher belohnen."
languages.original_text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."

languages.text: "Vig, tu as de la chance ! Tu es parti pour mourir, mais tu es revenu et tu as apporté de l'aide ! Les Anciens te récompenseront sûrement."
languages.original_text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."

languages.text: "维格，你真幸运！你去送死，却回来救人长老们一定会奖赏你的。"
languages.original_text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."

languages.text: "Vig, ¡qué suerte tienes! Te fuiste para morir, ¡pero volviste y trajiste ayuda en su lugar! Los Ancianos seguramente te recompensarán".
languages.original_text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."

languages.text: 「ヴィグ、お前は運がいい！死ぬために出て行ったのに、戻ってきて代わりに助けを持ってきてくれた！長老たちは必ず報いるだろう"
languages.original_text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."

languages.text: "Vig, ne kadar şanslısın! Ölmek için gittin ama geri döndün ve onun yerine yardım getirdin! Büyükler seni kesinlikle ödüllendirecek."
languages.original_text: "Vig, ain't you a lucky one! You left to die but came back and brought help instead! The Elders will surely reward you."
